ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "customer_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program of the customer */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "date_last_active" TEXT /* Date when the customer was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_category_id") REFERENCES customer_categories ("customer_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Code or number assigned to the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., electronics, appliances) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier of the product */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity at which the product should be reordered */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the product image */,
  "product_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that was ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product that was ordered */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of a single unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the specification belongs to */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute of the product (e.g., color, size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of attribute (e.g., color, size, material) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_categories" (
  "customer_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer category */,
  "customer_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the customer category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer support) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
